forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 84. South southwest wind around 10 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke between 10pm and 11pm, then patchy smoke and a slight chance of rain showers between 11pm and 1am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy smoke between 1am and 2am, then patchy smoke and showers and thunderstorms likely between 2am and 3am, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3am and 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 69. South southwest wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8am and 11am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 4pm, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 86, with temperatures falling to around 82 in the afternoon. West southwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
